purpose: Single source of truth for all data models across validator, routing engine, and API handler. Defines all enums, dataclasses, carbon constants, and serialization methods. No duplicate enum or dataclass definitions anywhere in the codebase.

TransportMode.description: Supported transport mode literals. Extends str so serialises to plain strings.

Currency.description: ISO 4217 currency codes supported by the planner.

Preference.description: User travel-style optimisation target: cheapest, fastest, or most scenic (walk-friendly).

ErrorCode.description: Machine-readable error codes returned in TravelOutput.error_code.

Status.description: Overall plan status: full success, partial (budget exceeded), or failed.

UpdateReason.description: Why a Diff was produced — drives UI update logic.

fields.transport_mode: TransportMode — mode used for this leg
fields.cost: float — transport cost in currency units
fields.carbon_kg: float — CO2 emissions for this leg
fields.score: float — internal ranking score (lower = better for COST/TIME)

fields.added_segments: list[Segment] — legs present in new plan but not base
fields.removed_segments: list[Segment] — legs present in base but not new plan

fields.route: list[Segment] — full ordered list of transport legs
fields.stops: list[Stop] — enriched stop list with connecting segments
fields.summary: dict — total_cost, total_duration_minutes, total_distance_km, total_carbon_kg, segment_count, budget_used_pct, currency
fields.budget_expansion: dict — per-segment cost breakdown keyed seg_XX_origin_dest
fields.diff: Diff|null — null for fresh plan, populated for incremental updates

CARBON_PER_KM.description: kg CO2 per passenger-kilometre by transport mode
